purpose: Draft (inactive) question objects derived from the Vinci 2026-07-08 quiz-6 batch -- a completed, handwritten 'Review Quiz #6' (Water Survival, SHLSOS Course #549), 22 fill-in-the-blank questions across 5 pages. These are NOT part of src/content/course.json's live "questions" array and will not appear in the app until explicitly promoted.
activationRule: Do not add any of these questions to course.json unless its verificationStatus has been changed away from 'draft-unverified'.
duplicateCheckNotes: Cross-referenced against all 250 live questions in src/content/course.json before drafting -- see the fuller duplicateCheckNotes in vinci-2026-07-08-quiz-6-source-intake.json for specifics. Dropped as duplicates: Q6 (Type I face-up design, duplicates q-quiz1a-typeI-pfd-false), Q18 (side-bench air tanks, duplicates q-quiz1a-side-bench-buoyancy-location and q-ch2-airtanks-vh), Q19 (sealing clamp, duplicates q-quiz1a-sealing-clamps), Q20 (tricing pendant timing, duplicates q-gloss-tricing), Q22 (windward launch disadvantage, substantially given already in q-quiz1a-windward-manual-launch's misconception text). Questions 7, 8, 9 were left blank by the student. Two near-duplicate pairs within this quiz were merged: Q3+Q4 (liferaft cold/tropical climate adaptation) and Q13+Q16 (condensation collection).

promotionHistory.note: Promotion of all 12 questions drafted from this batch -- all recommended 'ready now' in vinci-2026-07-08-quiz-6-promotion-review.md, no held-back questions, no content contradictions found in this batch.
